perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A group of four individuals—a man in a lime green shirt, a woman in a navy jumpsuit, and two people wearing large caricatured rubber masks—stand in a brightly lit indoor studio space. They are gesturing enthusiastically at the camera. (2) The scene cuts to a montage of items: large bags of clothes, suitcases, and numerous display shelves filled with anime figurines (specifically Dragon Ball characters). (3) The man in green walks through the empty studio, pointing out the vast space and more stacked boxes and collectibles. (4) The camera focuses on specific pricing labels appearing over shoes and toys. (5) The group reunites in the center, waving and pointing downward to conclude the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male and female voices are heard speaking rapidly over an upbeat, rhythmic background track. (2) Clapping and cheering sound effects are added as a major announcement is made. (3) The male speaker's voice increases in volume and pitch as he excitedly lists specific items and their low prices. (4) Brief silence occurs between spoken segments, filled by the continuous electronic BGM and occasional 'whoosh' or 'ding' sound effects. (5) The voices synchronize for a final enthusiastic shoutout followed by fading music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '隆重跟大家宣布 我們哈佛要來辦惜福祭' (Announcing our Harvard studio is holding a Blessing Festival) - Functional and excited. (2) '2月8日-2月9日' (February 8th-9th) - Functional. (3) 'haha baby 福利品 服飾 手作 生活用品' (haha baby benefit items: clothes, handmade, daily supplies) - Functional description. (4) '嘎哥二手衣 $100 起' (Ga-ge's second-hand clothes starting at $100) - Hook text. (5) '公仔玩具們 $3000 起' (Figures and toys starting at $3000) - Hook text. (6) '請參考下方活動資訊' (Please refer to activity info below) - Functional CTA.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Showcase -> Pricing Details -> Location Reveal -> Final CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female partner, 2 team members in masks
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in a lime green long-sleeve shirt and heavily distressed black jeans; a woman in a dark navy blue worker-style jumpsuit.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large, sparse indoor room with white walls, light wood flooring, and numerous tables/shelves holding anime collectibles and packed bags of merchandise.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a two-day flea market and clearance sale event hosted by the creator. The video aims to generate excitement by showcasing highly sought-after anime collectibles and brand-name merchandise at discounted prices while announcing the specific dates and location to drive physical foot traffic.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product categories, clear pricing overlays, and a call to action for the event.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tsai Ah-ga's signature high-decibel shouting, 'Harvard' studio nickname, use of team members in oversized masks.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses a 'warehouse clearance' aesthetic to create a sense of urgency and value, leveraging the creator's personal brand to move inventory.
